scheduledTasks.name: content-morning-sweep
scheduledTasks.prompt: Run the daily-content-supervisor agent in morning-sweep mode. Read MEMORY.md first, then proceed.

scheduledTasks.name: project-standup
scheduledTasks.prompt: Run the daily-project-supervisor agent in standup mode.

scheduledTasks.name: notion-mirror-daily
scheduledTasks.prompt: Run the notion-publisher agent in push mode. Mirror content/queue/ to Notion.

scheduledTasks.name: kanban-secretary-15min
scheduledTasks.prompt: Run the kanban-secretary agent. Read recent bus messages and sync card status across all boards.

scheduledTasks.name: content-eod-digest
scheduledTasks.prompt: Run the daily-content-supervisor agent in end-of-day mode.

scheduledTasks.name: project-eod-digest
scheduledTasks.prompt: Run the daily-project-supervisor agent in end-of-day mode.

scheduledTasks.name: research-morning-sweep
scheduledTasks.prompt: Run the daily-research-supervisor agent in morning-sweep mode.

scheduledTasks.name: research-eod-digest
scheduledTasks.prompt: Run the daily-research-supervisor agent in end-of-day mode.

scheduledTasks.name: research-monday-pull
scheduledTasks.prompt: Spawn the research-domain-lead with a request to run domain-researcher across all active domains, then notebooklm-bridge for staged prompts.

scheduledTasks.name: research-wed-trend-spot
scheduledTasks.prompt: Run the trend-spotter agent across all research domains.

scheduledTasks.name: weekly-research-digest
scheduledTasks.prompt: Run the weekly-digest-composer agent for the current ISO week.

scheduledTasks.name: weekly-newsletter-draft
scheduledTasks.prompt: Run the newsletter-writer agent for the current ISO week. Length: medium.

scheduledTasks.name: monthly-calendar
scheduledTasks.prompt: Run the content-calendar-planner agent for the current month.

scheduledTasks.name: master-overseer-daily
scheduledTasks.prompt: Run the master-overseer agent in daily-health mode.

scheduledTasks.name: weekly-self-evolution
scheduledTasks.prompt: Run the master-overseer agent in weekly-evolution-kickoff mode. It will spawn self-evolution-proposer and write proposals/week-NN-improvements.md. NOTHING is applied automatically — the user runs /apply-proposal.

scheduledTasks.name: research-to-content-monday
scheduledTasks.prompt: Run the research-to-content-orchestrator agent for all active research domains. For each domain in research/domains/*/ (skip _writing-signature), run the pipeline with depth=standard and all platforms.

scheduledTasks.name: notion-full-sync-daily
scheduledTasks.prompt: Run the notion-db-manager agent with mode=full-sync. Syncs all 6 Notion databases from local markdown.

scheduledTasks.name: writing-signature-review-monthly
scheduledTasks.prompt: Review research/domains/_writing-signature/profile.md against recent humanized content in content/queue/. Check for signature drift — are the humanized outputs still matching the profile? Post findings to bus/meta.

_notes.external_mcp_servers: Notion MCP and notebooklm-mcp-server are configured in settings.local.json (gitignored). See settings.local.json.template.
_notes.scheduled_tasks_install: Run `claude scheduled-tasks register` after editing this file.
